message:
feat(extensions-js): add TruncatedText, yaml, better-sqlite3, and pi-agent-core module shims

Expand the embedded JS module shim library to unblock additional
third-party extensions that import these dependencies:

**ink module**: Add TruncatedText class extending Text with a width
property, and export it from the default module object. Some extensions
use TruncatedText for constrained terminal output rendering.

**yaml module** (new): Minimal YAML parse/stringify shim supporting
simple key: value documents. parse() splits on newlines, skips comments
and blank lines, and extracts colon-delimited key-value pairs into a
plain object. stringify() reverses the process. Sufficient for config
file handling in extensions that depend on a yaml package.

**better-sqlite3 module** (new): Stub implementation of the better-sqlite3
Node.js native database driver. Provides a Database constructor with
prepare(), exec(), pragma(), transaction(), and close() methods that
return safe no-op results (empty arrays, zero-change run results, and
undefined gets). The transaction() wrapper supports .immediate,
.deferred, and .exclusive variants. Extensions that use SQLite for
local caching or state will load without error but operate as no-ops.

**@mariozechner/pi-agent-core module** (new, + /index.js variant): Stub
for the Pi agent core package, exporting ThinkingLevel enum and
AgentTool class. Registered under both the bare package name and the
/index.js subpath to handle both import styles.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
